job_summary: An AI-Driven Trial Monitoring Specialist uses artificial intelligence and advanced analytics to optimize clinical trial monitoring and decision-making.
key_responsibilities: Implement AI tools for trial monitoring and risk prediction
Analyze large datasets for patterns and anomalies
Support predictive analytics for patient recruitment and retention
Collaborate with data science and clinical teams
qualifications: Life Sciences + Data Science / AI background
work_environment: Pharma companies, CROs, AI healthcare startups
career_path: AI Specialist → Clinical Data Scientist → Digital Health Leader
skills_required: analyze large datasets for patterns and anomalies
collaborate with data science and clinical teams
implement ai tools for trial monitoring and risk prediction
support predictive analytics for patient recruitment and retention
